3107960.name: Difficult times
3107960.description:
Monsters are attacking! Enemies are moving along the roads to the portals, and you must stop them! Summon knights and place towers that will attack the aggressor! For destroyed enemies, you will receive gold, which you can spend on defensive structures. Place barricades on the roads to slow down the enemy's movement. Use magic to turn the tide of battle. Use resources wisely and you will win!

Game genre - tactics

Game features:

  • Dynamic gameplay

  • Lots of enemies

  • Interesting gameplay
